title: Indulgent Crispy German Rhubarb Tart
description: A rich and crispy German dessert featuring forced rhubarb, this tart is perfect for satisfying your sweet tooth. It is halal-friendly and made with high-quality ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the puff pastry on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
In a large bowl, combine the chopped rhubarb, confectioners sugar, and salt.
Arrange the rhubarb mixture on one half of the pastry, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
Fold the other half of the pastry over the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Brush the pastry with the melted butter and make a few small cuts in the top to allow steam to escape.
Bake the tart for 40 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
Allow the tart to cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Drizzle with a little extra melted butter and sprinkle with sugar, if desired.
